Please follow the folder structure carefully to ensure proper identification and verification:

- Open the upload link provided.
- Select your District folder.
- Inside the district folder, select the School folder.
- Within the school folder, create a new folder for the student.
- Name the student folder using the Student ID only.
- Upload all related photos and videos inside the respective Student ID folder.

column62: - Most students require adaptive chairs. At present, students are seated on regular chairs using pillows or by being tied to the chair; however, this arrangement is unstable and students tend to slide. An appropriate adaptive chair is required to ensure proper posture and comfortable seating (like MORECARE Wooden Cerebral Palsy Child Seating and Reclining Chair).  - some students face attention issues, so a device which is arch shaped wherein we could insert letters or pictures would be good. their focus is better directed through an arched shaped layout
